allies.rationale_text: Systems-thinking helps psychological-safety treat suppressed dissent as a structural signal about the whole organization rather than as isolated interpersonal friction.
Boundaries help psychological-safety pair openness with clear ownership, standards, and decision rights so candor actually improves the system.
Critical-thinking turns psychological-safety into a truth-seeking asset by making challenge serve decision quality rather than comfort or status display.
allies.source_quote: candid truth in service of better decisions

antagonists.rationale_text: Authority-bias suppresses the upward challenge that psychological-safety exists to make possible.
antagonists.source_quote: formal status discourages upward challenge despite visible risk

antagonists.rationale_text: Confirmation-bias grows when teams suppress dissent and filter evidence to match the prevailing leadership view instead of surfacing contradictions.
antagonists.source_quote: absence of safety causes teams to suppress dissent and filter evidence

structured_tensions.tension_text: Psychological-safety conflicts with authority-bias when formal status discourages upward challenge despite visible risk.
structured_tensions.source_quote: psychological-safety vs authority-bias: psychological-safety conflicts with authority-bias (authority bias) when formal status discourages upward challenge despite visible risk.

structured_tensions.tension_text: Psychological-safety conflicts with confirmation-bias when absence of safety causes teams to suppress dissent and filter evidence to match the prevailing leadership view.
structured_tensions.source_quote: psychological-safety vs confirmation-bias: psychological-safety conflicts with confirmation-bias (confirmation bias) when absence of safety causes teams to suppress dissent and filter evidence to match the prevailing leadership view.

curation_notes.summary: The raw source is strongest on systems and truth-seeking allies plus explicit conflicts with status-suppressed challenge and filtered evidence, so the file preserves that conservative surface.
donor_drops: Did not preserve donor culture-program relation sprawl beyond the clearly named candor, authority, and anti-confirmation neighborhood.
open_questions: Commitment-bias is source-real pressure too, but the retained set favors the two explicit current-vocabulary tension blocks.
